# Shortcut AI

> AI Registry entry [AIR-28](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-28/shortcut-ai) — status **Sandbox** as of 2026-04-06. Departments: finance, office-of-ceo.

**Category:** AI Spreadsheet Agent
**Cost per User/Month:** $20 Pro; Teams $160 base + $20/seat; Enterprise custom
**Departments:** Finance, Office of CEO
**Evaluator:** Ann Greed (Finance)

## Overview

AI-powered spreadsheet agent by Fundamental Research Labs. Positioned as most accurate Excel AI agent. Standalone web/desktop app, Excel plug-in (official Microsoft Partner), Google Sheets plug-in. Trusted by KKR, Microsoft, OpenAI, Anthropic.

## Capabilities

* AI Excel agent — natural language for spreadsheet tasks
* Formula-driven outputs (dynamic, not hard-coded)
* Professional formatting auto-applied
* Non-destructive editing — full audit trail
* Auditability — shows every changed cell
* Excel plug-in (100% feature parity); web 95%
* Platform API on Pro+
* SpreadsheetBench: 59.25% (vs Copilot 57.2%, Claude Files Opus 4.1 42.9%, ChatGPT Agent 35.3%)

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type I (Type II in progress)
* GDPR, CCPA
* No AI training on paid plan data — zero-retention
* AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit
* SSO/MFA on Teams/Enterprise
* Vanta privacy centre

## Considerations

* Credit-based pricing — Pro 500 credits/month, each message 2-15 credits
* Direct comparison with Claude for Excel (AIR-30) — Ann evaluating both
* Excel plug-in route preferable for Finance (already in Excel)
* Zero-retention satisfies Section 5.2.3 for confidential financial data
* SSO available on Teams plan — check Microsoft Entra compatibility

*Sandbox — active evaluation (Urgent priority). Evaluator: Ann Greed (Finance).*
